title: shows
html:
My paintings have been shown in Vancouver venues and galleries since 1986 including Art Works Gallery, Gallery Repartée, Hong Kong Bank Atrium, and Espresso Head.

Recent shows include:

  • 2011: Juried group show titled Bountiful in Mount Vernon, WA
  • 2013: Solo show titled Force of Nature at the Waterfront Gallery on Granville Island, Vancouver, BC
  • 2015: Group show titled Double Life at Port Moody Arts Centre, Port Moody, BC
